projectDescription: A fun, kid-hosted online quiz tournament where players sign up with a magic link, answer weekly quiz rounds to survive elimination, and compete for the top spot on the leaderboard.
keyFeatures: Magic-link email sign-in — no passwords needed
Weekly quiz rounds with multiple-choice and true/false questions
Live standings leaderboard ranked by cumulative score
Single-elimination bracket with optional losers bracket
Bracket predictions game with points scoring
Practice rounds that don't affect standings
Two visual themes: Picture-book and Arcade (neon)
Host panel with full tournament management controls
Email announcements to all enrolled players
publicApiSurface: GET / — Home page with tournament status and CTA
GET /signin — Sign-in page for returning players
GET /play — Player dashboard with active/past rounds
GET /play/round/[n] — Play or review a specific round
GET /predict — Bracket predictions for signed-in players
